title: Drug resistance in Mycobacterium tuberculosis: An evolutionary perspective and its adaptation to the lung microenvironment

L2: M. tuberculosis drug resistance mechanisms are viewed through an evolutionary lens
Adaptation to the lung microenvironment shapes drug resistance evolution in TB
L3: Examination of acquired drug resistance mechanisms in Mycobacterium tuberculosis from an evolutionary perspective, analyzing how adaptation to the lung microenvironment influences resistance to isoniazid, rifampicin, and ethambutol
